topics.description_en: Multi-Link Operation: simultaneous transmissions across 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz bands. Defined in 802.11be (Wi-Fi 7) and extended in 802.11bn. Covers STR / NSTR / SLO modes, traffic allocation across links, link-add / remove flows, MLO setup frames, and per-link MAC behaviour.
topics.description_zh: 多链路操作：跨 2.4 / 5 / 6 GHz 频段同时收发。在 802.11be（Wi-Fi 7）中定义，并在 802.11bn 中扩展。涵盖 STR / NSTR / SLO 模式、跨链路流量分配、链路增删流程、MLO 建立帧及每链路 MAC 行为。

topics.label_zh: 多 AP 协调与协调空间复用 (Co-SR)
topics.description_en: Multi-AP Coordination (MAPC), Coordinated Spatial Reuse (Co-SR), Coordinated Beamforming (Co-BF), Non-Primary Channel Access (NPCA), Distributed Resource Units (DRU) — the central 802.11bn mechanisms for orchestrating simultaneous transmissions and channel reuse across neighbouring APs. Includes group setup, scheduling, and coordinated MU-MIMO research.
topics.description_zh: 多 AP 协调（MAPC）、协调空间复用（Co-SR）、协调波束成形（Co-BF）、非主信道接入（NPCA）、分布式资源单元（DRU）——802.11bn 中协调相邻 AP 同时收发与信道复用的核心机制。涵盖组建立、调度，以及协调 MU-MIMO 研究。

topics.description_en: Restricted Target Wake Time (R-TWT), low-latency / deterministic delivery, latency-bounded link layers (e.g. NSDI 'Law'). Bridges 802.11be / 802.11bn scheduling primitives with XR / real-time / agentic-traffic latency requirements.
topics.description_zh: 受限目标唤醒时间（R-TWT）、低时延 / 确定性交付、有时延界保证的链路层（如 NSDI 'Law'）。将 802.11be / 802.11bn 调度原语与 XR / 实时 / 智能体流量的时延需求衔接。

topics.description_en: 802.11bf WLAN sensing (monostatic / bistatic / multistatic / passive), Channel State Information (CSI) processing, RF fingerprinting (RFF), and downstream applications: respiration / activity / fall detection, device fingerprinting, room occupancy.
topics.description_zh: 802.11bf 无线局域网感知（单 / 双 / 多 / 被动站点）、信道状态信息（CSI）处理、射频指纹（RFF），以及下游应用：呼吸 / 活动 / 跌倒检测、设备指纹、房间占用判别。

topics.description_en: Fine Timing Measurement (802.11mc / 802.11az / 802.11bk), secure ranging, indoor positioning. Spans accuracy benchmarking, downgrade attacks, and secure-FTM defenses.
topics.description_zh: 精细时间测量（802.11mc / 802.11az / 802.11bk）、安全测距、室内定位。覆盖精度基准、降级攻击及安全 FTM 防御。

topics.label_zh: AMP-IoT 与面向 IoT 的窄带 Wi-Fi
topics.description_en: 802.11bp Ambient Power IoT (battery-less / energy-harvesting devices), Wi-Fi 7 20-MHz IoT certification, and other narrow-band Wi-Fi paths for sensor-class devices.
topics.description_zh: 802.11bp 环境能量供电 IoT（无电池 / 能量采集设备）、Wi-Fi 7 20 MHz IoT 认证，以及面向传感器类设备的其他窄带 Wi-Fi 方案。

topics.description_en: 60 GHz mmWave operation tightly coupled with sub-7 GHz Wi-Fi (802.11bq). Includes guard intervals, packet formats, mmWave-only-vs-coupled architectures, and the unresolved beacon-frame question.
topics.description_zh: 60 GHz mmWave 与 sub-7 GHz Wi-Fi 紧耦合的运行模式（802.11bq）。涵盖保护间隔、包格式、纯 mmWave vs 耦合架构以及尚未定论的信标帧问题。

topics.description_en: 802.11bn Ultra-High-Reliability work that doesn't fit a more specific topic — UHR-SIG signaling, Enhanced Long Range (ELR), high-level draft progress, plenary readouts, AIML / AI Offload Study Group activity, and Wi-Fi 9 / WNG discussions.
topics.description_zh: 不属于更具体主题的 802.11bn 超高可靠性工作——UHR-SIG 信令、增强长距离（ELR）、草案高层进度、全会综述、AIML / AI Offload 研究组活动，以及 Wi-Fi 9 / WNG 讨论。

topics.description_en: Wi-Fi 7 / 802.11be rollout: silicon and AP product launches, customer deployments, vendor market thesis pieces, silicon-revenue prints, M&A activity, and analyst coverage of the 2025-2027 Wi-Fi 7 transition window. The deployment-side counterpart of `wifi8-uhr` for the current shipping generation. MLO-mechanism work stays in `mlo`; this bin is the ecosystem story.
topics.description_zh: Wi-Fi 7 / 802.11be 部署面：硅片与 AP 产品发布、客户部署、厂商市场观点、硅片营收数据、并购、以及围绕 2025-2027 Wi-Fi 7 过渡窗口的分析。是 `wifi8-uhr` 在当下出货代际上的部署侧对位。MLO 机制工作仍归 `mlo`；本桶覆盖生态故事。

topics.description_en: 6 GHz unlicensed Wi-Fi rollout, upper-6 GHz contention with mobile, AFC (Automated Frequency Coordination), regional decisions (FCC / Ofcom / RSPG / EU), and other regulatory milestones that shape what Wi-Fi can do where.
topics.description_zh: 6 GHz 免许可 Wi-Fi 推行、Upper-6 GHz 与移动业务的争用、AFC（自动频率协调）、区域监管决策（FCC / Ofcom / RSPG / 欧盟），以及决定 Wi-Fi 在何处能做什么的监管节点。

topics.label_zh: AI 优化 Wi-Fi（射频 / 调度优化）
topics.description_en: Machine learning, reinforcement learning, and LLM-driven optimisation of Wi-Fi PHY / MAC parameters: CW selection, scheduling, spatial-reuse decisions, power control, link adaptation, channel allocation. The output of these systems is a radio decision; the input is the network state.
topics.description_zh: 机器学习、强化学习与 LLM 驱动的 Wi-Fi PHY / MAC 参数优化：CW 选择、调度、空间复用决策、功率控制、链路自适应、信道分配。系统输出是射频侧决策，输入是网络状态。

topics.label_zh: 面向 AI 工作负载的 Wi-Fi
topics.description_en: Wi-Fi carrying AI / autonomous-system payloads — XR streams, on-device LLM coordination, agentic traffic, AND computation offloading from edge devices to LAN-side compute (Wi-Fi-only; cellular offloading is out of scope and filtered at ingest). The defining question is: what does the radio need to deliver so AI workloads stay within their latency / loss / throughput budget?
topics.description_zh: Wi-Fi 承载 AI / 自治系统负载——XR 流、设备端 LLM 协调、智能体流量，以及边缘设备到 LAN 侧算力的计算卸载（仅当卸载跳板为 Wi-Fi 时；蜂窝卸载不在范围，会在采集环节过滤）。核心问题是：为了让 AI 工作负载保持在其时延 / 丢包 / 吞吐预算内，射频侧需要交付什么。

topics.label_en: Agentic Wi-Fi (LLM agents managing the network)
topics.label_zh: 智能体 Wi-Fi（LLM 智能体管理网络）
topics.description_en: LLM-based agents that perceive, plan, and act on the Wi-Fi network — orchestration agents, troubleshooting agents, code-generating policy agents, and multi-agent frameworks like WirelessAgent / WirelessAgent++ / ComAgent. The network is the agent's environment; the action space is configuration and control.
topics.description_zh: 在 Wi-Fi 网络上感知、规划、行动的 LLM 智能体——编排智能体、排障智能体、生成策略代码的智能体，以及 WirelessAgent / WirelessAgent++ / ComAgent 等多智能体框架。网络是智能体的环境，动作空间是配置 / 控制。

topics.description_en: Authentication, MAC privacy, ranging security, downgrade resistance, sensing privacy, formal verification of protocols. Spans WPA2 / 3 weaknesses, PHY-preamble defenses, MAC re-randomization, VoWiFi attack tooling, and threat models for the agentic / sensing layers.
topics.description_zh: 认证、MAC 隐私、测距安全、抗降级、感知隐私、协议形式化验证。覆盖 WPA2 / 3 弱点、PHY 前导码防御、MAC 再随机化、VoWiFi 攻击工具链，以及智能体 / 感知层威胁模型。

topics.description_en: Fast BSS-Transition, MLO-roam, predictive / context-aware roaming, MLME extensions for roaming context, mobility within 6 GHz / unlicensed bands.
topics.description_zh: 快速 BSS 切换、MLO 漫游、预测式 / 上下文感知漫游、面向漫游上下文的 MLME 扩展、6 GHz / 免许可频段中的移动性。

topics.description_en: Energy-side aspects of TWT / R-TWT (the latency aspects live in `rtwt-latency`), AMP-IoT energy budgets, deep-sleep schedules, battery-aware scheduling, and the device-side power story for Wi-Fi 7 / Wi-Fi 8 IoT classes.
topics.description_zh: TWT / R-TWT 的能耗面（时延面归 `rtwt-latency`）、AMP-IoT 能量预算、深睡眠调度、电池感知调度，以及 Wi-Fi 7 / Wi-Fi 8 IoT 类设备端的功耗叙事。

topics.description_en: 3GPP 5G New Radio: the air interface for 5G. Covers FR1 (sub-7 GHz) and FR2 (mmWave), flexible numerology, massive MIMO, beam management, and URLLC/eMBB/mMTC service classes.
topics.description_zh: 3GPP 5G 新空口：5G 的空口接口。覆盖 FR1（sub-7 GHz）与 FR2（mmWave）、灵活参数集、大规模 MIMO、波束管理，以及 URLLC/eMBB/mMTC 服务类别。

topics.description_en: 3GPP Long Term Evolution and LTE-Advanced: the global 4G standard. Covers OFDMA downlink, SC-FDMA uplink, carrier aggregation, CoMP, and HetNet architecture.
topics.description_zh: 3GPP 长期演进及 LTE-Advanced：全球 4G 标准。涵盖 OFDMA 下行、SC-FDMA 上行、载波聚合、CoMP 及 HetNet 架构。

topics.description_en: ITU IMT-2030 and early 6G research: sub-THz communications, AI-native air interface, integrated sensing and communication (ISAC), reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS), and 3D network architecture.
topics.description_zh: ITU IMT-2030 与 6G 早期研究：亚太赫兹通信、AI 原生空口、通信感知一体化（ISAC）、可重构智能表面（RIS）及三维网络架构。

topics.label_zh: 大规模 MIMO 与波束成形
topics.description_en: Massive MIMO for cellular: antenna arrays with 64-256+ elements, hybrid beamforming, MU-MIMO scheduling, channel reciprocity exploitation (TDD), and AI/ML-driven beam management.
topics.description_zh: 蜂窝大规模 MIMO：64-256+ 阵元的天线阵列、混合波束成形、MU-MIMO 调度、信道互易性利用（TDD），以及 AI/ML 驱动的波束管理。

topics.description_en: 3GPP NTN: integrating satellite and high-altitude platform (HAPS) links into 5G/6G. Covers transparent and regenerative payload architectures, Doppler pre-compensation, and NTN-specific RAN protocols.
topics.description_zh: 3GPP NTN：将卫星及高空平台（HAPS）链路集成到 5G/6G 中。涵盖透明与再生载荷架构、多普勒预补偿及 NTN 特定 RAN 协议。

topics.label_zh: 开放 RAN / 虚拟化 RAN
topics.description_en: O-RAN Alliance architecture: disaggregated RAN with open fronthaul interfaces, RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC), virtualized DU/CU, and multi-vendor interoperability.
topics.description_zh: O-RAN 联盟架构：具有开放前传接口的解耦式 RAN、RAN 智能控制器（RIC）、虚拟化 DU/CU 及多厂商互通。

topics.description_en: End-to-end network slicing in 5G: dedicated logical networks sharing the same physical infrastructure, each with guaranteed QoS. Involves NSSF, SDN orchestration, and slice-aware RAN scheduling.
topics.description_zh: 5G 端到端网络切片：共享同一物理基础设施的专用逻辑网络，各具 QoS 保证。涉及 NSSF、SDN 编排及切片感知的 RAN 调度。

topics.description_en: ETSI MEC: deploying compute at the network edge (near gNB/UPF) for ultra-low-latency applications. Covers service continuity, MEC federation, and AI inference offloading from UE to edge.
topics.description_zh: ETSI MEC：在网络边缘（近 gNB/UPF 处）部署计算以实现超低时延应用。涵盖服务连续性、MEC 联邦及 UE 到边缘的 AI 推理卸载。

topics.description_en: AI/ML applied to cellular RAN and core: neural channel estimation, RL-based scheduling, LLM-driven network operations, AI-native 6G air interface, and 3GPP RAN3 ML study items.
topics.description_zh: AI/ML 应用于蜂窝 RAN 与核心网：神经信道估计、基于 RL 的调度、LLM 驱动的网络运维、AI 原生 6G 空口，及 3GPP RAN3 ML 研究课题。

topics.description_en: Spectrum allocation for cellular: sub-1 GHz (coverage), mid-band / C-band (capacity/coverage balance), mmWave (hotspots), and emerging FR3 / upper mid-band (7-24 GHz). Includes WRC-23/27 decisions.
topics.description_zh: 蜂窝频谱分配：sub-1 GHz（覆盖层）、中频 / C-band（容量覆盖平衡）、mmWave（热点），以及新兴 FR3 / upper mid-band（7-24 GHz）。包含 WRC-23/27 决定。

topics.description_en: 5G/6G security architecture: SUPI/SUCI privacy, 5G-AKA authentication, SEPP for roaming security, quantum-safe cryptography migration, and RAN/edge threat models.
topics.description_zh: 5G/6G 安全架构：SUPI/SUCI 隐私、5G-AKA 认证、用于漫游安全的 SEPP、抗量子密码迁移，及 RAN/边缘威胁模型。

topics.description_en: 3GPP Reduced Capability (RedCap) NR devices: a 5G tier between eMBB and NB-IoT for wearables, industrial sensors, and video surveillance. eRedCap (Rel-18) further reduces bandwidth and antenna count.
topics.description_zh: 3GPP 降低能力（RedCap）NR 设备：位于 eMBB 与 NB-IoT 之间的 5G 层级，面向可穿戴、工业传感器和视频监控。eRedCap（Rel-18）进一步降低带宽和天线数量。

topics.description_en: SpaceX Starlink: the largest LEO constellation. Covers Gen1/Gen2 deployment, inter-satellite laser links, Direct-to-Cell service, user terminal evolution, and capacity measurements.
topics.description_zh: SpaceX 星链：最大的低轨星座。覆盖 Gen1/Gen2 卫星部署、星间激光链路、Direct-to-Cell 服务、用户终端演进及容量实测。

topics.description_en: Competing LEO constellations: OneWeb (Eutelsat), Amazon Project Kuiper, Telesat Lightspeed. Covers orbit design, ground segment, regulatory coordination, and service differentiation.
topics.description_zh: 竞争性低轨星座：OneWeb（Eutelsat）、Amazon Project Kuiper、Telesat Lightspeed。涵盖轨道设计、地面段、监管协调及服务差异化。

topics.description_en: IoT over satellite: NB-IoT NTN, LoRa via satellite, direct-to-satellite sensor networks. Addresses remote-area coverage, energy-constrained uplink, and store-and-forward architecture.
topics.description_zh: 卫星物联网：NB-IoT NTN、卫星 LoRa、直连卫星的传感器网络。解决偏远地区覆盖、能量受限上行及存储转发架构问题。

topics.description_en: Connecting unmodified smartphones directly to satellites: Starlink Direct-to-Cell, AST SpaceMobile, Apple/Globalstar emergency SOS. Covers Doppler compensation, TDD timing, and link budget challenges.
topics.description_zh: 未经改装的智能手机直连卫星：Starlink Direct-to-Cell、AST SpaceMobile、Apple/Globalstar 紧急 SOS。涵盖多普勒补偿、TDD 时序及链路预算挑战。

topics.description_en: AI/ML for satellite: onboard AI processing, ML-driven beam-hopping, predictive orbit/Doppler estimation, AI-optimized ISL routing, and anomaly detection for mega-constellations.
topics.description_zh: 卫星 AI/ML：星上 AI 处理、ML 驱动的波束跳变、预测式轨道/多普勒估计、AI 优化的星间链路路由，以及巨型星座的异常检测。

topics.label_zh: 非静止轨道监管与协调
topics.description_en: ITU/FCC regulatory framework for NGSO systems: spectrum sharing, interference protection, orbit debris mitigation, and multi-administration coordination.
topics.description_zh: ITU/FCC 对非静止轨道（NGSO）系统的监管框架：频谱共享、干扰保护、轨道碎片减缓及多行政辖区协调。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth LE core specification (5.0-6.0): 2 Mbps PHY, extended advertising, periodic advertising, isochronous channels, channel classification, and connection subrating. The foundation for all modern Bluetooth applications.
topics.description_zh: 低功耗蓝牙核心规范（5.0-6.0）：2 Mbps PHY、扩展广播、周期性广播、同步信道、信道分类及连接子额定。所有现代蓝牙应用的基础。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth LE Audio: LC3 codec, Auracast broadcast audio, multi-stream audio, hearing-aid profiles. The next-generation Bluetooth audio stack replacing Classic Audio.
topics.description_zh: 低功耗音频：LC3 编解码器、Auracast 广播音频、多流音频、助听器规范。替代经典音频的下一代蓝牙音频协议栈。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth Mesh networking: managed flooding, relay nodes, publish/subscribe model, mesh security (separation of concerns), and large-scale lighting/building-automation deployments.
topics.description_zh: 蓝牙 Mesh 组网：受控泛洪、中继节点、发布/订阅模型、Mesh 安全（关注点分离），以及大规模照明/楼宇自动化部署。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth 6.0 Channel Sounding: phase-based ranging (PBR) and round-trip timing (RTT) for centimeter-level distance measurement. Enables secure proximity, digital key, and fine indoor location.
topics.description_zh: 蓝牙 6.0 信道探测：基于相位的测距（PBR）与往返计时（RTT），实现蓝牙设备间厘米级距离测量。支撑安全接近、数字钥匙及精细室内定位。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth security: LE Secure Connections, cross-transport key derivation, address randomization, and known attack surfaces (BIAS, BLURtooth). Includes Bluetooth SIG security updates.
topics.description_zh: 蓝牙安全：LE 安全连接、跨传输密钥派生、地址随机化及已知攻击面（BIAS、BLURtooth）。包含 Bluetooth SIG 安全更新。

topics.description_en: Bluetooth direction finding: Angle of Arrival (AoA) and Angle of Departure (AoD) using antenna arrays. Enables sub-meter real-time location (RTLS), indoor navigation, and item tracking.
topics.description_zh: 蓝牙方向查找：使用天线阵列的到达角（AoA）与出发角（AoD）。实现亚米级实时定位（RTLS）、室内导航及物品追踪。

topics.description_en: IEEE 802.15.4z UWB precise ranging: HRP (High Rate Pulse) and LRP (Low Rate Pulse) PHYs, time-of-flight with picosecond precision, single-sided/two-way/double-sided two-way ranging, and TDoA positioning.
topics.description_zh: IEEE 802.15.4z UWB 精密测距：HRP（高速脉冲）与 LRP（低速脉冲）PHY、皮秒级飞行时间测量、单边/双向/双边双向测距，及 TDoA 定位。

topics.label_zh: FiRa 联盟与 UWB 服务
topics.description_en: FiRa Consortium: application-layer protocols built on IEEE 802.15.4z for interoperable UWB services: digital key (CCC), hands-free access, point-and-trigger, and secure payment.
topics.description_zh: FiRa 联盟：构建在 IEEE 802.15.4z 之上的应用层协议，实现可互操作的 UWB 服务：数字钥匙（CCC）、免提门禁、指向即触发及安全支付。

topics.description_en: UWB distance-bounding security: scrambled timestamp sequence (STS), physical-layer authenticated ranging, relay-attack resistance, and the 802.15.4z security enhancements that make UWB suitable for car-key and payment applications.
topics.description_zh: UWB 距离界定安全：加扰时间戳序列（STS）、物理层认证测距、抗中继攻击，以及使 UWB 适用于车钥匙和支付应用的 802.15.4z 安全增强。

topics.description_en: UWB-based radar sensing: presence detection, gesture recognition, vital-sign monitoring using impulse-radio UWB. Co-exists with ranging on the same hardware; emerging as a separate mode in 802.15.4ab.
topics.description_zh: 基于 UWB 的雷达感知：利用脉冲无线电 UWB 实现在场检测、手势识别、生命体征监测。在相同硬件上与测距共存；正作为独立模式出现在 802.15.4ab 中。

topics.label_zh: SLB 基础接入（高速低时延）
topics.description_en: SparkLink Basic (SLB): the high-speed, low-latency NearLink mode for bandwidth-intensive applications (screen mirroring, wireless VR, high-res audio). Uses Polar codes and hybrid ARQ; targets <1 ms air-interface latency at multi-Gbps rates.
topics.description_zh: 星闪基础接入（SLB）：面向带宽密集型应用（投屏、无线 VR、高解析音频）的高速低时延 NearLink 模式。使用 Polar 码与混合 ARQ；目标空口时延 <1 ms、速率数 Gbps。

topics.description_en: SparkLink Low Energy (SLE): power-optimised NearLink mode for IoT, wearables, and battery-constrained devices. Comparable to BLE but with higher data rates and lower latency at similar power budgets.
topics.description_zh: 星闪低功耗（SLE）：面向 IoT、可穿戴和电池受限设备的功耗优化 NearLink 模式。与 BLE 对标，但在同等功耗预算下提供更高数据速率与更低时延。

topics.description_en: NearLink coexistence with Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular in the shared 2.4/5/6 GHz bands. Covers interference management, spectrum etiquette, and multi-radio SoC integration (Huawei Kirin with Wi-Fi/BT/NearLink).
topics.description_zh: 星闪与 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝在共享 2.4/5/6 GHz 频段中的共存。涵盖干扰管理、频谱规范及多模 SoC 集成（华为麒麟芯片 Wi-Fi/BT/星闪三模合一）。

topics.description_en: NearLink in automotive: digital car key (comparable to UWB CCC), in-vehicle audio/video distribution, wireless battery management (wBMS), and vehicle-to-infrastructure communication. A key vertical for SparkLink adoption in Chinese OEMs.
topics.description_zh: 星闪车载应用：数字车钥匙（对标 UWB CCC）、车载音视频分发、无线电池管理（wBMS）及车路通信。中国车企采用星闪的关键垂直场景。
